biological_replicate: the procedures described above were analysed in biological triplicate (n=3).
technical_replicate: for each biological replicate, the technical duplicate was considered.
experimental_design: the aim of this work was to investigate the antioxidant activity of CAMC, CC and CM following in vitro digestion.
factor_value: the aim of this work was to investigate the antioxidant activity of CAMC, CC and CM.
number_of_technical_replicates: for each biological replicate, the technical duplicate was considered.
number_of_biological_replicates: the procedures described above were analysed in biological triplicate (n=3).
number_of_samples: the procedures described above were analysed in biological triplicate (n=3).
